task_objective: Skip eager process suspension on app launch unless auto-sync is confirmed enabled, the app is tracked, and the app lifetime instance ID is eligible.
tests_added: Updated tests/test_frontend_static.py::test_frontend_launch_gate_pauses_before_start_check_and_resumes_in_finally to assert the shouldPauseLaunch preflight includes auto-sync, tracked, numeric instance ID, and instanceID > 1 gates before pauseGameProcessCall.
design_decisions: Kept backend lifecycle checks authoritative for disabled, unmatched, current, restore-needed, conflict, and failure decisions.
Used the frontend LudusaviStateStore only as a conservative preflight filter before invoking the process suspension RPC.
Treated null settings as auto-sync not confirmed active, so launch suspension is skipped until settings are loaded.
Preserved the existing paused flag as the only condition that permits resumeGameProcessCall in finally.
results: Baseline targeted static tests passed before changes.
Red test failed before implementation because autoSyncEnabled and shouldPauseLaunch were absent.
Targeted static tests passed after implementation.
./run.sh uv run ruff format . completed; one Python test file was reformatted.
./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed.
./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 311 tests.
